issues.description: Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but card text says 'place 2 cards from your hand at the bottom of your deck' — this is a deck placement, not trash. Should use 'PlayFromHand' or equivalent deck-bottom placement action, not discard.
DrawCard action missing condition check. Card text states 'If your Leader has the {Cross Guild} type, draw 2 cards' — DrawCard must be conditional on LeaderHasType:'Cross Guild', not unconditional.
